和往常那种求生不一样。将迷雾求生和公路求生结合在一起了，这个创意不错。主角有底线也不圣母，也可以说是小仙草一枚。","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":30,"text":"迷雾求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%BF%B7%E9%9B%BE%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742023526A27C800%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227548467525733696281%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227541645027907226686%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%BF%B7%E9%9B%BE%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":39,"s":35,"text":"公路求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742023526A27C800%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227548467525733696281%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227541645027907226686%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757516911,"group_id":"7541645027907226686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7qleLJBccZdKMFdimgeQlzfpglFIQ3eZIjVrl4RA5iS","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3aaef042df474210a88e3dbca73ae35e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796897&x-signature=JOJAUCV3Mm4RbVS5%2BihqxSVnzBs%3D","user_id":"4300892907508872","user_name":"马踏春风得意时"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4300892907508872","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777194216,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":36,"name":"马上发帖","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bac86db20ea02e8e0eb989703e0d9a43","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3870c3280f5de1e0496c3327d86d111d"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541645027907226686","book_info":{"abstract":"    【全民穿越】【迷雾世界】【克苏鲁】【信息流】【硬核求生】

    全民穿越灰雾世界开始求生。

    这个世界灰雾丛生，到处遍布着凶残的畸变生物与惊悚可怖的诡异。

    神明遗落在世间的权柄，成为了唯一的超凡之路。

    而秦胜，非常幸运地觉醒了名为全知之眼的天赋，只要精神力足够，就能窥探到一切信息。

    坏消息是，这个世界的神明，不可直视，一旦直视，就会陷入不可遏制的疯狂之中。

    因此为了保证自己的智商能够一直占领高地，不因诸神陷入恐惧，他做出了一个违背祖宗的决定。

    屠神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7ac2e81212299e49593aebe97faf8722~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"扑街大仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7541645027907226686","book_name":"灰雾求生：我能看见一切信息","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541645550647525950","read_count":"220","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"243234"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"107","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,求生,克苏鲁,斩神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d30ffadac2543d0e5af8f2eeece5808a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386352&x-signature=aeMMdFC7K5ulcr2SRVft75XxQWA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1113129016638445","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015911E836E77DD4E96A27C800"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
